---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in AgenticOrg
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Execute '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Python Version:** (e.g., 3.11.9)
- **Deployment Type:** (Docker Compose / Kubernetes / Local dev)
- **AgenticOrg Version/Commit:** (e.g., v2.0.0 or commit SHA)

## Agent / Connector Involved

- **Agent type:** (e.g., FinanceAgent, HRAgent, MarketingAgent, OpsAgent, BackofficeAgent)
- **Connector:** (e.g., SAP, Workday, Salesforce, Jira, None)
- **Tenant ID:** (if applicable, redact sensitive info)

## Error Code

If the error includes an E-series code, please provide it here:

- **Error Code:** (e.g., E1001, E2003, E3010)
- **Error Message:** (full message from logs or API response)

## Logs / Screenshots

Attach relevant log snippets, screenshots, or Grafana dashboard captures.

> **Important:** Ensure all PII is masked before pasting logs.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., recently changed configuration, unusual load patterns, shadow-mode discrepancies).
